notes: Complex e-commerce homepage with search, auth, cart, category navigation, and personalized content. Heavy JS with dynamic loading. Cookie banner. Multiple overlapping navigation elements. Category dropdown in search bar adds complexity.

endpoints.label: Search Bar
endpoints.description: Product search input with category dropdown filter and search button

endpoints.label: Sign In
endpoints.description: Header sign-in link redirecting to eBay authentication page

endpoints.label: Shopping Cart
endpoints.description: Cart icon in header linking to basket/checkout page

endpoints.label: Category Navigation
endpoints.description: Horizontal category links below header: Elektronik, Mode, Haus & Garten, etc.

endpoints.label: Sell Button
endpoints.description: Header link to list an item for sale on eBay

endpoints.label: Cookie Consent Banner
endpoints.description: GDPR cookie banner with Accept/Reject/Settings buttons

endpoints.label: My eBay (Watchlist/Orders)
endpoints.description: Dropdown or link to watchlist, purchase history, and account overview
